title: North of the Border
writer: James Oliver Curwood, Arthur V. Jones
actors: Russell Hayden, Inez Cooper, Douglas Fowley
plot: Rancher "Utah" Neyes crosses the border into Canada to meet his partner, only to find that the latter has been murdered by a gang led by "Nails" Nelson. "Utah", with the aid of RCMP Jack Craig and fur-trapper Ivy Jenkins, manages ...
